query:
SELECT 
  'company_test_001' as companyId,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE companyId = 'company_test_001') as sales,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM historicalSales WHERE companyId = 'company_test_001') as historicalSales,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions WHERE companyId = 'company_test_001') as commissions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE companyId = 'company_test_001') as properties
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'company_baggio_001',
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sales WHERE companyId = 'company_baggio_001'),
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM historicalSales WHERE companyId = 'company_baggio_001'),
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions WHERE companyId = 'company_baggio_001'),
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE companyId = 'company_baggio_001')
UNION ALL

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commissions WHERE companyId = 'company_delmack_001'),
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM properties WHERE companyId = 'company_delmack_001')
